summary: Comprehensive backend API testing completed for rideshare application. Core functionality working well with 78.9% success rate. Authentication, maps, rides, and admin features operational.

minor_issues.impact: Real-time driver tracking may not work

expected_behaviors.issue: Admin user already registered as driver
expected_behaviors.explanation: Expected behavior - admin seeding working correctly
Expected security measure - drivers need admin verification
Expected business logic - ratings only for completed rides

passed_tests: OTP Authentication - Send/Verify working for all user types
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix WebSocket authentication for driver real-time tracking. Verify driver ID extraction and token validation in WebSocket endpoint.
